verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It Is Good To Praise The Lord And Make Music To Your Name O God Most High To Proclaim Your Love And Faithfulness All The Day And Through The Night

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lai Lai Lai Lai Lai Lai Lai Lai…

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: May I Dwell In Your Courts O Lord Then To Flourish Like The Trees Of Lebanon Planted In The House Of Adonai There To Live Forever more
